metadata.description: Control-plane marketplace for the autonomous coding harness: issue -> PR -> risk-gated merge -> deploy -> rollback.

plugins.name: core-workflow
plugins.description: Turns a GitHub issue into a PR: plan-from-issue, create-pr (gated), ci-monitor, plus PreToolUse/SessionEnd hooks.

plugins.name: risk-review
plugins.description: AI reviewer that classifies a PR GREEN/YELLOW/RED against a repo risk policy and drives auto-approval.

plugins.name: evals
plugins.description: Golden-test + LLM-judge eval harness used as a required merge gate (esp. for RAG/behavioral changes).

plugins.name: deploy-aws
plugins.description: Reference AWS deploy/rollback adapter: blue-green via CodeDeploy, AppConfig flags, CloudWatch heartbeat rollback.
